title: Mission Plotter Replays
summary: Replay timeline slider for each mission lane so visitors can scrub how plans changed over time.

title: Wallpaper Remix Lab
summary: Let visitors remix wallpaper palettes live and export a custom SVG set.

title: Captain's Log Audio Dispatch
summary: One-click spoken digest output so logs can be consumed while walking or commuting.

title: Atlas Constellation Mode
summary: Animated graph mode that clusters related pages into constellations with guided tours.

title: Routine Boss Fights
summary: Gamified weekly challenge layer with escalating checklists and completion badges.

title: Now Board Share Cards
summary: Generate compact social-safe cards from active focus slots for quick sharing.

title: Release Radar Prediction Lane
summary: Track likely release windows and confidence scores based on past cadence.

title: Field Notes Geographic Layer
summary: Optional location metadata with map clustering for travel-heavy note sessions.

title: Command Center TV Mode
summary: Hands-free auto-rotating dashboard view tuned for wall displays and second monitors.

title: Expedition Difficulty Curves
summary: Visual pace line for each expedition showing risk spikes and buffer windows.
